commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And you shall make a plate of pure gold, and engrave upon it, like the engravings of a signet, HOLINESS TO THE LORD. Plate; reaching from ear to ear, two fingers' breadth, tied behind like a diadem, Wisdom xviii. Holy, or "sanctity, belongeth to the Lord "and all who approach to Him, ought to be holy. (Calmet) Josephus represents the ornaments of the high priest's head, like the triple crown of the pope. (Antiquities iii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
